# GitHub repo metadata
# Apply these at: https://github.com/aryaminus/astro/settings

## Description (max 350 chars)
Trustworthy multi-tradition astrology for AI agents. 19 calculation modes across Western, Vedic, and BaZi traditions. Deterministic Python engine (zero deps), 18 MCP tools, 27 REST endpoints, REST + MCP + Skill transports. Free by default; one-click deploy to Render.

## Website
https://github.com/aryaminus/astro

## Topics (comma-separated when setting via UI, or via gh CLI)
astrology, ephemeris, mcp, mcp-server, fastapi, ai-agent, model-context-protocol, vedic, jyotish, bazi, western-tropical, skill, openapi, python, pure-python, zero-dependency, chart-calculation, horoscope, agent-skills, rest-api

To set via gh CLI:
  gh repo edit aryaminus/astro \
    --description "Trustworthy multi-tradition astrology for AI agents. 19 calculation modes across Western, Vedic, and BaZi traditions. Deterministic Python engine (zero deps), 18 MCP tools, 27 REST endpoints, REST + MCP + Skill transports. Free by default; one-click deploy to Render." \
    --add-topic astrology --add-topic ephemeris --add-topic mcp --add-topic mcp-server \
    --add-topic fastapi --add-topic ai-agent --add-topic model-context-protocol \
    --add-topic vedic --add-topic jyotish --add-topic bazi --add-topic western-tropical \
    --add-topic skill --add-topic openapi --add-topic python --add-topic pure-python \
    --add-topic zero-dependency --add-topic chart-calculation --add-topic horoscope \
    --add-topic agent-skills --add-topic rest-api

## Social preview image
Upload at: Settings → Social preview → "Upload an image"
Recommended: 1280 × 640 px PNG with the project name, "19 modes · 18 MCP tools · 27 REST endpoints · Zero deps · Free by default"
